text: This perfume brand is so venereal and slutty that it was locked up in the guerrilla exhibit in the Paxulajican Paris. I'm talking about fatitas, the perfume brand known for its scent inspired by human flesh. Up first is urina bovis, perhaps the most controversial and my guilty pleasure. When wafted this fragrance, Greta Gerwig said she personally regretted not making little women sludger. It has notes of cumin, owl pellet, frog dissection, and leather. This next scent, labia menorah, is like urina bovis's cleaner younger cousin. There's orange marmalade, Bradford pear, freshly inked squid, and fiona apples criminal. This fragrance was created from a sample of the queen's pussy after her tea with Paddington bear. If you have the clean girl aesthetic but wish you could sleep in the locker room, this is the perfume for you.
